PowerShell(Write-Host "✅ Verifying database created..."; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite\\sms_lite.db" | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime; Write-Host "`n✅ Verifying frontend assets bundled..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1 | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='Content-Type';E={$_.Headers['Content-Type']}}, @{N='BodyLength';E={$_.Content.Length}})

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; Write-Host "✅ Frontend endpoint response: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Type: $\($response.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Host "Body length: $\($response.Content.Length\) bytes"; Write-Host "`nFirst 300 chars of response:"; $response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $response.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell(Write-Host "🔍 Testing API endpoints...`n"; Write-Host "1. GET /api/students \(should return empty list initially\)"; $students = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/students" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; Write-Host "   Status: $\($students.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "   Response: $\($students.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $students.Content.Length\)\)\)"; Write-Host "`n2. GET /api/courses"; $courses = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/courses" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; Write-Host "   Status: $\($courses.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "   Response: $\($courses.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $courses.Content.Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell(Write-Host "✅ Executable verification:"; Get-Item "d:\\SMS\\student-management-system\\dist\\SMS_Native_Lite.exe" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size \(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB, 1\)}}; Write-Host "`n✅ Database file verification:"; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite\\sms_lite.db" | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size \(KB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 1\)}}; Write-Host "`n✅ Debug log final state:"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite\\debug.log")

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process SMS_Native_Lite -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "✅ SMS_Native_Lite.exe is running \(PID: $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Write-Host "Process info:"; $proc | Select-Object Name, Id, WorkingSet, StartTime; Write-Host "`nStopping process..."; $proc | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "✅ Process stopped" } else { Write-Host "⚠️ Process not found or already stopped" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "`n5️⃣ API Endpoint Tests" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "`nTesting Swagger/OpenAPI documentation..."; $docs = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/docs" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; if \($docs.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ Swagger UI available"; if \($docs.Content -match "swagger"\) { Write-Host "   ✅ Valid Swagger content" } }; Write-Host "`nTesting OpenAPI schema..."; $openapi = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; if \($openapi.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ OpenAPI schema available"; $schema = $openapi.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "   Title: $\($schema.info.title\)"; Write-Host "   Version: $\($schema.info.version\)"; Write-Host "   Paths: $\($schema.paths.Count\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "`n6️⃣ Data Operations Test" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "`nTesting database connectivity via API..."; $status = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/status" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1; if \($status.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ Status endpoint works"; $s = $status.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "   Environment: $\($s.environment\)"; Write-Host "   Database: $\($s.database\)"; Write-Host "   Version: $\($s.version\)" }; Write-Host "`nChecking database integrity..."; $integrity = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/debug/db-integrity" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1; if \($integrity\) { Write-Host "✅ DB integrity endpoint accessible" } else { Write-Host "⚠️ DB integrity endpoint not found \(expected in production\)" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\SMS\\student-management-system"; Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { .\\dist\\SMS_Native_Lite.exe }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite\\debug.log"\) { Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Vasilis\\AppData\\Local\\SMS_Native_Lite\\debug.log" } else { Write-Host "Debug log not found" }; Stop-Job $job 2>&1 | Out-Null)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\SMS\\student-management-system" && Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "SMS|python"} | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m PyInstaller backend/lite_entrypoint.spec --noconfirm 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
